about.label: About Us
about.title: More Than Just
about.description1: SkyPower Fitness Centre is a modern sports complex in Varna, designed for people who value their training. It offers a wide variety of fitness equipment, cardio machines, strength training zone, group classes and spacious free weights area.
about.description2: The equipment is suitable for beginners, advanced users, strength sports, functional training and competition preparation. The hall is lit with natural light, features large windows and a quality audio system.

zones.title: Our Zones
zones.subtitle: Everything you need to achieve maximum results.

zones.title: Free Weights
zones.desc: Wide variety of dumbbells and free weights, ideal for isolation and basic strength exercises.

zones.title: Cardio Zone
zones.desc: High-class treadmills, cross trainers and ergometers for full cardio training and endurance.

zones.title: Plate Loaded
zones.desc: Specialized machines with free weights for maximum muscle control and safety.

pricing.title: Monthly
pricing.subtitle: Pricing
pricing.instructorText: 🏋️‍♂️ Training with Instructor: Single session: 12 € | 23.47 BGN | Monthly + instructor (with 8/12 visits cards): ask at reception.
pricing.multisportText: ✔️ MultiSport: The facility accepts MultiSport cards. Valid for a single visit.
